//: Declarative MCP server template for tools/setup-mcp.sh. Memory MCP intentionally absent (ADR 0003). Servers with requires_secret=true are skipped by setup-mcp.sh; add them manually with secrets injected (ADR 0001 / 0002).

servers.//: github MCP needs GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN — ADD MANUALLY:
servers.//1: claude mcp add -e GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN=<token> github -- docker run -i --rm -e GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN ghcr.io/github/github-mcp-server
servers.name: github
servers.description: GitHub operations (PRs, issues). REQUIRES SECRET — skipped by setup-mcp.sh.
